sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40647" key="e)pipro/seimi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπρόσ-ειμι</orth>, Astrol., <sense id="n40647.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be present as well</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:279:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">279.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
